subject: (no subject)
body:
Larry wanted me to let you know Sikorsky is having a heli pick him up tomorrow to take him to see your Sikorsky; they need his input on some design questions. They will take him back to Teterboro around 2pm or 3pm. He just wanted to make sure this was OK in case you wanted to leave earlier than 6pm. 

... and I LOVE my Range Rover!! Thank you so much; it's so exciting!!
